title: satureja coccinea
intro: Satureja coccinea, also known as red savory, is a flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja coccinea include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in aromatherapy and homeopathic remedies.
